productDisplayName: Fastrack Unisex White Black Printed Sling Bag
description: If cool is your middle name, this white and black sling bag belongs in your collection. The skull print on the front will get you all the attention, while the super light-weight and very spacious bag makes it an ideal one for everyday use.Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityOne very large and roomy main compartment with a small zippered pocket Graphic print on the front with brand name printed on the sideDraw cords for tightening and loosening the bag's mouth, and for slinging it over the shouldersBrand tab appliqued on the sideNylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
